calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-055 differentiable CEM substrate-readiness diagnostic
items.notes: Substrate-readiness diagnostic for SD-055 differentiable CEM (softmax-weighted ao_mean). 5 UCs: config flags, legacy path, no spurious detach, gradient flows, path divergence. Smoke 5/5 PASS 2026-05-15.
